title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・限界の先へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka lives up to her moniker of the
Otherworldly Front-Runner and takes first at the
autumn Tenno Sho in a whirlwind victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers of celebration for her victory ring out over
the Tokyo Racecourse for what seems like
forever.
